generated_notes: Snapshot of the 63 hand-edited review pages, verbatim archive cards and the current homepage blurb/thumb tuning. The build script treats these as read-only and composes them with any new CMS reviews. Regenerate with python3 _working/migrate_legacy.py if hand-edits change.
